patch.value: Replaces release.yml changelog steps with --mode replace --all-release-tags so the full CHANGELOG.md is regenerated every release. Adds --since-previous-tag/--until-release-tag to the RELEASE_NOTES.md step so only the new release tag's items appear in the GitHub release body. Bumps @types/node devDependency to ^25.9.1.
Bump @types/node to ^25.9.1 and rewire CI to full-history changelog
Pick up latest @types/node minor and switch release.yml to --mode replace --all-release-tags --version for deterministic CHANGELOG.md regeneration on every release run.
@types/node ^25.9.1 installed, release workflow uses --all-release-tags with pending --version flag, RELEASE_NOTES.md is windowed to the new release tag.
deps and CI changes committed; release pipeline produces full-history CHANGELOG.md and per-release GitHub release notes
package.json + release.yml updated; 31 unit tests still pass; npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities

value.author: claude
value.text: Picked up after npm view confirmed 25.9.1 latest.

value.author: claude
value.text: package.json now also exposes changelog:full for local full-history rebuilds and changelog:check uses replace mode to catch drift.

value.author: claude
value.text: GitHub release notes should use --since-previous-tag/--until-release-tag windowing so the release body shows just the new tag's changes, while the committed CHANGELOG.md shows the full history.
